professionalSummary.intro: Senior full-stack engineer with extensive Node.js backend development experience, including building high-volume API services and data-intensive e-commerce platforms. Proven track record of optimizing system performance and delivering solutions under tight timelines.
keyStrengths: Architected and maintained Node.js backend services handling inventory synchronization across e-commerce platforms with complex relational data models
Optimized API performance and data loading patterns to prevent resource exhaustion in high-traffic environments
Delivered full-stack features from database schema design through frontend implementation using modern JavaScript frameworks
Led teams delivering high-impact features within constrained timelines while maintaining code quality standards
Strong debugging and systems optimization skills with hands-on experience in Linux environments

careerHighlights: Owned and maintained the inventory-sync backend platform integrating Carousell sellers with Shopify, handling high-volume data synchronization
Led migration of inventory-sync microservices into Carousell infrastructure with improved reliability and performance
Delivered platform features including order post-processing workflows and fraud detection systems at scale
Architected frontend systems using Next.js with focus on performance optimization and scalable component patterns
Mentored engineers on type-safe development practices and engineering quality standards
